observations.archetype_gloss: Embodiment of exhaustion and drained fury, representing the internal shadow of decay and weariness
observations.summary: Aviel is depicted as ancient, shrunken, and exhausted, his fury drained, symbolizing a descent into the shadow aspect of his psyche, embodying decay and fatigue.

evidence.quote: In the dim light of approaching dawn, Aviel looked ancient. Shrunken. The fury had drained from him, leaving only exhaustion in its wake.
